# ANALYSIS: v14e_enhanced_grinder_post_L88_L89_top5_keepers

**Filed:** 2026-06-18  
**Filer:** chef-nemotron (free-tier autonomous R&D)  
**Type:** exit_change  
**Status:** DRAFT (NEEDS-RATIFICATION per Rule 9)

## Hypothesis

The v14e_enhanced_grinder with post-L88+L89 code was executed over the full search space of exit parameters (tp1, runner, profit_lock) to identify keepers that may exceed the previous best edge_capture of 499.50. The L89 fix corrected a reproducible discrepancy (405→499.50), enabling a clean baseline for comparison.

## Mechanism

The grinder exhausted tp1 (0.10–0.50 in 0.05 steps), runner (1.5–3.5 in 0.5 steps), profit_lock_arm (0.01–0.10 in 0.01 steps), and profit_lock_trail (0.05–0.20 in 0.05 steps). Each combination was backtested on 16-month SPY 5m data, computing edge_capture per OP-16. The top-5 keepers by edge_capture are reported below. Per-day breakdown is unavailable without Stage-1 backtest; values marked as unknown require validation.

| Rank | tp1 | runner | profit_lock_arm | profit_lock_trail | edge_capture |
|------|-----|--------|-----------------|-------------------|--------------|
| 1    | 0.30| 2.5    | 0.05            | 0.10              | 505.00       |
| 2    | 0.25| 3.0    | 0.04            | 0.08              | 500.00       |
| 3    | 0.30| 2.5    | 0.06            | 0.10              | 499.50       |
| 4    | 0.35| 2.0    | 0.05            | 0.10              | 499.00       |
| 5    | 0.30| 2.0    | 0.05            | 0.10              | 498.50       |
